raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Energy management","name":"How does being late to work affect your energy and focus throughout the day?","description":"Explores the impact of punctuality on their overall energy levels and productivity.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Workload perception","name":"What does your current workload look like, and how do you feel about managing it?","description":"Gathers insight into their workload and their feelings about managing it effectively.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team dynamics","name":"How connected do you feel with the team lately, and what might be influencing that?","description":"Probes their sense of connection within the team, which could reveal underlying issues.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback loops","name":"Can you share a recent instance where feedback significantly changed your approach or perspective?","description":"Aims to uncover how feedback influences their work and collaboration with the team.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Growth aspirations","name":"What specific skills or areas are you looking to develop further in your role?","description":"Identifies their aspirations for professional growth and development.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Connection with design","name":"How do you feel about the current design processes we have in place?","description":"Seeks their perspective on design processes and potential areas for improvement.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Impact of lateness","name":"What do you think contributes to your lateness, and how does it affect your work?","description":"Encourages a reflection on the reasons for their lateness and its impact on their performance.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Prioritization choices","name":"Given your current workload, what are you choosing to prioritize over other tasks?","description":"Encourages them to think about their choices in workload management and prioritization.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]}]}
